PROJECTS_PAGE.CARD_DESC: Integrated software solution for monitoring and controlling mechanical pumping in oil production.

ABOUT_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Enterprise Identity
ABOUT_PAGE.HISTORY_P1: We are a company dedicated to the research and development of new technologies with an emphasis on cutting-edge applications and equipment for the Oil and Gas industry.
ABOUT_PAGE.HISTORY_QUOTE: Our software is specifically designed to help obtain maximum performance from mechanical pumping systems.
ABOUT_PAGE.HISTORY_P2: By leveraging advanced data analysis and intelligent automation, our software offers benefits such as monitoring, analysis, and early detection of faults.
ABOUT_PAGE.MISSION_TEXT: Our mission is to provide our clients with innovative solutions that drive efficiency, sustainability, and profitability.
ABOUT_PAGE.VISION_TEXT: To be recognized globally as a leader in automation solutions.
ABOUT_PAGE.VALUES_TEXT: Our core values guide every decision and action we take.
ABOUT_PAGE.STAFF_DESC: We have a team of passionate and highly qualified professionals.

SMARTLINK.HERO_P1: The comprehensive solution that transforms field data into strategic decisions.
SMARTLINK.HERO_P2: your oil operations from anywhere, in real time.
SMARTLINK.CARD2_DESC: Go beyond simple monitoring. Track live data from sensors, production, and equipment status.
SMARTLINK.CARD4_DESC: Receive critical notifications instantly. Configure custom alerts to respond proactively.
SMARTLINK.CARD5_DESC: Execute actions directly from the interface securely and with authorization.
SMARTLINK.CARD6_DESC: Need a specific feature? Our platform is built to be flexible.
SMARTLINK.DINAI_DESC: Precise visualization of load states and well behavior through real-time surface and downhole diagrams.

CAREERS.DESC: Join the team that is redefining industrial monitoring.
CAREERS.REDIRECT_MSG: THIS PROCESS IS MANAGED UNDER STRICT CONFIDENTIALITY STANDARDS.

SOFT.TITLE: SOFTWARE ENGINEER
SOFT.DESC: We are looking for engineers with a disruptive vision to scale our intelligent monitoring platform. Your mission will be to optimize the data flow from the oil field to the user interface.
SOFT.REQ3: Commitment to writing clean and scalable code.

ELEC.TITLE: ELECTRONIC ENGINEER
ELEC.DESC: Responsible for the telemetry hardware lifecycle. We are looking for someone capable of integrating industrial communication systems in demanding conditions.
ELEC.REQ1: Experience in industrial hardware design and maintenance.
ELEC.REQ2: Handling of Modbus, MQTT and sensor networks.
ELEC.REQ3: Ability for on-site and remote troubleshooting.
ELEC.REQ4: Knowledge in solar power systems and batteries.

INST.TITLE: INSTRUMENTATION TECHNICIAN
INST.DESC: Key profile to ensure that downhole sensors transmit accurate information. You will be the guardian of production data accuracy.
INST.REQ1: Calibration and assembly of pressure and level instruments.
INST.REQ2: Strict compliance with industrial safety regulations.
INST.REQ3: Previous experience in oil well services.
INST.REQ4: Proactive attitude for working in multidisciplinary teams.

PRODUCTS.VARIADOR_DESC: Three-phase speed controller ideal for industrial pumping systems.
PRODUCTS.VARIADOR_LONG: This 15HP frequency inverter offers exceptional torque control and energy efficiency for three-phase motors. It includes an intuitive control panel, overload and short-circuit protection, and is easily integrated using industrial communication protocols.
PRODUCTS.CABLE_DESC: 100m roll. Resistant to high pressures and corrosive environments.
PRODUCTS.CABLE_LONG: 100-meter roll of power cable specifically designed for deep submersion. Its special reinforced polymer coating guarantees zero leakage and extreme resistance to corrosive elements.
